## PR #1315 — AI reply consolidation

**Title**: AI reply consolidation: LINE Shop staged rollout, cost hygiene, runtime embeddings  
**Author**: iamnaii  
**Base**: `main` → **Head**: `feat/ai-reply-consolidation`  
**Size**: 53 files changed, +2316 / -1224  
**URL**: https://github.com/iamnaii/BESTCHOICE/pull/1315  

### File Changes Summary

Key areas modified:
- `chat-ai-draft/` — stripped to take-over/release only (dead draft pipeline removed)
- `chat-intent-router/` — **deleted entirely** (cost savings)
- `line-oa/line-oa-chatbot.controller.ts` — SHOP webhook handler (no new unguarded endpoints)
- `staff-chat/cron/embedding-backfill.cron.ts` — new WS3 nightly cron
- `staff-chat/staff-chat.controller.ts` — new `POST /staff-chat/ai/embedding-backfill` (OWNER only)
- `chat-adapters/line-shop.adapter.ts` — reply-token-first delivery
- `chat-engine/services/after-hours.service.ts` — adds `aiPaused` check + usage logging
- `sales-bot/sales-bot.service.ts` — adds `AiUsageService.record()` calls
- `AiSettingsPage.tsx` — LINE Shop AI toggle UI

### Issues

#### ⚠️ Warning — `Number()` on Decimal field in `postDraft` (payments service — pre-existing)

**File**: `apps/api/src/modules/payments/payments.service.ts`  
**Lines**: ~326, ~337  
**Note**: This is in the **payment-wizard-followups branch** (not #1315), but is worth flagging as it exists on the codebase path toward main.

```ts
// payments.service.ts postDraft()
Number(draft.amount)                                      // draft.amount is Decimal @db.Decimal(12,2)
Number(draft.lateFeeWaiverAmount)                         // same
```

`PaymentDraft.amount` is `Decimal @db.Decimal(12, 2)` but passes through `Number()` before calling `recordPayment()`. The orchestrator re-wraps it with `d(amount)` (i.e. `new Prisma.Decimal(amount.toString())`), so the actual JE math is Decimal-safe. But the intermediate `Number()` step violates the no-float-for-money rule and risks silent precision loss for edge-case amounts.

**Fix**: Change `postDraft()` to use `.toString()` directly:
```ts
// Replace:
Number(draft.amount)
// With:
draft.amount.toString()   // and update recordPayment() to accept string | Decimal for amount
```

Or add an overload/wrapper that accepts `Decimal` directly.

#### ℹ️ Info — Raw `fetch()` in RecordPaymentWizard (S3 presigned upload — legitimate)

**File**: `apps/web/src/pages/PaymentsPage/components/RecordPaymentWizard.tsx:290`

```ts
const putRes = await fetch(presign.uploadUrl, {
  method: presign.method,
  body: file,
  headers: { 'Content-Type': file.type },
});
```

This is a **direct PUT to S3** via a presigned URL obtained from our API first. Using `api.post()` here would be wrong (it would add JWT `Authorization` headers that S3 would reject). This is the correct pattern. No action needed.

### Positive findings (PR #1315)

- All new/modified controllers have class-level `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)` ✅
- All new endpoints have `@Roles()` decorators ✅
- New `POST /staff-chat/ai/embedding-backfill` endpoint is `@Roles('OWNER')` ✅  
- `LINE_SHOP_AI_ENABLED` gate is env-based + whitelist + Settings checkbox (3-layer kill switch) ✅
- All `$queryRaw` / `$executeRaw` use Prisma parameterized template literals — no SQL injection ✅
- New `EmbeddingBackfillCron` wraps entire batch in try/catch → Sentry on failure ✅
- After-hours service now checks `aiPaused` — regression fixed ✅
- `aiPaused` check added to handoff guard, preventing bot from replying to taken-over rooms ✅
- `queryClient.invalidateQueries()` called after all mutations in frontend ✅
- No hardcoded secrets — new env vars added to `.env.example` only ✅

## PR #1324 — AI hardening follow-ups

**Title**: AI hardening follow-ups: windowed cap, full LLM instrumentation, backfill resilience  
**Author**: iamnaii  
**Base**: `feat/ai-reply-consolidation` → **Head**: `feat/ai-hardening-followups`  
**Size**: 30 files changed, +672 / -111  
**URL**: https://github.com/iamnaii/BESTCHOICE/pull/1324  
**Note**: Stacked on #1315 — requires #1315 merged first.

### File Changes Summary

- `embedding-backfill.cron.ts` — per-row fallback, `EMBED_FAILED` marker, systemic-outage breaker
- `sales-bot.service.ts` — error rows with tokens on throw, honest `errorKind` (`tool_error` vs `provider_error`)
- `ai-pricing.ts` — longest-prefix match + `gemini-2.5-flash-lite` rate added
- `ai-auto-reply.service.ts` — rolling 24h window cap (was lifetime-of-room cap)
- 5 modules instrumented: `vision.service`, `credit-check.service`, `ocr`, `ai-assistant`, `knowledge-extractor`
- `AiSettingsPage.tsx` — label updated to reflect 24h rolling window

### Issues

No Critical, Warning, or Info issues found.

### Positive findings (PR #1324)

- No new controllers or endpoints — all instrumentation is fire-and-forget `void this.aiUsage.record({...})` ✅
- Systemic-outage breaker: full-batch failure → throw to outer catch (no `EMBED_FAILED` stamp) — conservative by design ✅
- Per-row fallback: poison row marked `EMBED_FAILED` and skipped on next run — no infinite retry ✅
- `errorKind` field correctly distinguishes `tool_error` vs `provider_error` ✅
- Rolling 24h cap via `createdAt: { gte: windowStart }` DB filter — no in-memory state ✅
- No `Number()` on Decimal fields ✅
- No raw SQL string concatenation ✅
- TDD throughout — 10+ new unit tests ✅
